style: Horizontal dark fantasy ARPG status rail bitmap texture. No text, no buttons, no SVG, no diagonal shine.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: status rail must compress currency, count, power, and upgrade actions without competing with inventory icons.

prompt: Create one long horizontal bitmap UI texture for a compact Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG inventory status rail. Aged black iron, dark stone, subtle brass rivets, quiet carved trim, low contrast center bands for overlay text, premium hand-painted game UI material. No readable text, no letters, no numbers, no icons, no buttons, no slot grid, no orbs. Avoid SVG, flat vector, CSS gradient, white diagonal shine, sweeping glare, lens flare, neon, glossy plastic, cartoon cute UI, MapleStory style, beige cream palette. Opaque PNG, restrained mature dark fantasy interface trim.
acceptance: Long horizontal trim suitable for an overlay status strip.
No text, icon, button, orb, or slot grid is embedded.
No white diagonal shine or SVG-like flat look appears.
